title: Kofta Furniture
description: This mod adds furniture and also vertical slabs
body:
This mod adds new furniture to minecraft as well as vertical slabs

New items:

Tables of different types [​Oak, Dark oak, Spruce, Acacia]\
Dark Oak Chair (Didn't add other wood types for now)\
Beds of different types [​Oak, Dark oak, Spruce, Acacia] (cant sleep only decoration)\
Vertical Slabs of different types [​Oak, Dark oak, Spruce, Acacia]\
Sofas [Acacia, Oak, Dark Oak, Spruce, Acacia]
